w:description.w:val: Blank header set up for left, right, and center alignment
Title and author name
Page number on geometric graphic, aligned to outside corner of page; ideal for use in odd pages of a document with book layout
Header with a simple page border
Plain right-aligned page number
Center-aligned name and document title on two lines
Page number and slice accent graphic
Blank header
Right aligned document title
Right-aligned author name and date with center-aligned document title
Accent tab with page number
Document title and date on two-tone accent color block
Right-aligned page number with space for your own left- and center-aligned content
Page number on geometric graphic, aligned to outside corner of page; ideal for use in even pages of a document with book layout
Shaded header with document title
Bold color band with document title in reverse text
Reverse color block title coordinates with Badge theme
Crop graphic with page number coordinates with Crop theme

v:group.alt: Title: Crop graphic with page number

w:description.w:val: Document title coordinates with Feathered theme
Feather accent graphic coordinates with Feathered theme

wp:docPr.name: Group 1
wp:docPr.title: Drawing of a feather as a header accent

v:group.alt: Title: Drawing of a feather as a header accent

w:description.w:val: Tab graphic with page number coordinates with Headlines themes
